items.title: Honeywell Gears Up to Post Q4 Earnings: What Lies Ahead for the Stock?
items.description: HON is set to report Q4 results on Jan. 29, with revenues seen up 0.7% and EPS up 2.8% as aerospace and building units offset energy weakness.

items.title: Recent Report Shows That Sen. Angus S King, Jr. Bought Up to $30K Worth of Honeywell Intl Stock
Honeywell's Maheshwari On India's Trade Deals
items.description: Honeywell President & CEO, Global Regions, Anant Maheshwari discusses the potential impact of India's trade deals on Honeywell's businesses. He speaks with Menaka Doshi from the sidelines of India Energy Week 2026.
